title: Macaw's Quark
description: A multiple compability for Quark with Macaw's Mods like Bridges/Roofs/or Fences.
body:
This mod adds compatibility between Macaw's mods such as Bridges/Fences or Roofs.

**Bridges**
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uLtxXFVm/images/f45c50324c9445c2253dea84fd66b1107a21b8e1.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uLtxXFVm/images/f45c50324c9445c2253dea84fd66b1107a21b8e1.png)

**Fences**
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uLtxXFVm/images/932459ed25c3fe1a4a4a7854d77bfb5a97261404.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uLtxXFVm/images/932459ed25c3fe1a4a4a7854d77bfb5a97261404.png)

**Hedges**
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uLtxXFVm/images/5c9cdca549bdfe999ab47f8642b755b49d47637d.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uLtxXFVm/images/5c9cdca549bdfe999ab47f8642b755b49d47637d.png)

**Roofs**
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uLtxXFVm/images/b3681c206bd580f1ee34eedddac4189a474aa808.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uLtxXFVm/images/b3681c206bd580f1ee34eedddac4189a474aa808.png)

Update 1.18.2+
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uLtxXFVm/images/6c63242773c28cfa04948e980aeb14532526e82e.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uLtxXFVm/images/6c63242773c28cfa04948e980aeb14532526e82e.png)

Depedencies :

- [AddonsLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/addonslib)
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
- [AutoRegLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoreglib)

- [Zeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/zeta) (For 1.20.1+)

Optionals :

[Macaw's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw)
